task_completion.description: Apply Justify alignment to all body text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text in the document columns has straight, even edges on both the left and right margins. The 'Justify' alignment button in the Home ribbon (Paragraph group) should appear highlighted when the text is selected.

task_completion.description: Enable automatic hyphenation for the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Hyphens are visible at the end of lines where words break across lines. The Page Layout ribbon > Hyphenation menu may be shown with 'Automatic' selected.

task_completion.description: Set hyphenation zone to 0.25 inches and limit consecutive hyphens to 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Hyphenation' dialog box is visible on screen, showing the 'Hyphenation zone' field set to '0.25"' and the 'Limit consecutive hyphens to' field set to '2'.

task_completion.description: Insert a 3-line 'Dropped' Drop Cap for the first paragraph.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first letter of the first paragraph is significantly larger, spanning exactly 3 lines of text, and is embedded within the paragraph text (Dropped style). The Drop Cap dialog box may be visible showing 'Dropped' selected and 'Lines to drop' set to 3.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the Save icon (floppy disk) in the Quick Access Toolbar, uses File > Save, or presses Ctrl+S. The document title bar continues to show 'Community_Newsletter.docx'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Microsoft Word 2010 GUI to perform formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Word 2010 interface (Ribbons, dialog boxes) rather than using a terminal, PowerShell, or script editor to modify the file.

integrity.description: Agent modified the correct target document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The title bar of the Word application consistently displays 'Community_Newsletter.docx'.

integrity.description: Agent performed the formatting manually rather than running a pre-written VBA script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Visual Basic editor or Macros dialog is not used to bypass the required UI interactions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires setting the hyphenation zone to 0.25 inches (which internally corresponds to 360 twips) and limiting consecutive hyphens to 2. The drop cap must be exactly 3 lines high and use the 'Dropped' style. Ensure these specific values are visible in the respective dialog boxes (Hyphenation Options and Drop Cap settings) during the trajectory.
